files.src/types.ts:
export interface ConflictZone {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  region: string;
  conflict: string;
  lat: number;
  lon: number;
  zoom: number;
  status: "active" | "intense" | "escalating" | "critical";
  description: string;
  lastEvent: string;
  color: string;
}
